home.title: NTM - NAI Tag Manager
home.description:
NAI Tag Manager is a supporting tool for NAI users.

[Features]
1. Tag Viewer: View metadata of image files.
2. Tag Diff: Compare generation metadata between two images.
3. Tag Remover: Remove embedded metadata from images. Supports batch processing by folder.
4. Scene Data: Features under the Scene Data group are for NAIS2's Scene Mode.
  4.1. Random Weight: Generate presets by specifying weight ranges and appearance probabilities for tag groups.
  4.2. Scene Preset Batch: Generate presets containing all possible combinations of scenes.
  4.3. Scene Preset Edit: Batch remove, replace, or insert tags within scene presets.

tagRemover.dropzone: Drop files or folders here or click to add
tagRemover.pageInfo: Remove tags from image files and save them as new files.

tagViewer.pageInfo: Check metadata (tags) of images generated with Novel AI.
tagViewer.dropzone: Drop an image here or click to add
tagViewer.noMetadataFound:
This image does not contain
metadata

tagDiff.pageInfo: Compare metadata information between two images.

randomWeight.title: Random Weight Combination
randomWeight.pageInfo:
Generate scene data by randomly placing weights and appearance probabilities.
Setting the step to 0 calculates weights in increments of 0.01.

scenePresetBatch.title: Scene Preset Batch
scenePresetBatch.pageInfo:
Combine blocks to generate all combinations of scene data.
You can specify a scene title by entering a `keyword` at the beginning of a sequential block.
scenePresetBatch.placeholderSequential: Enter multiple prompts separated by line breaks (Enter)...

scenePresetEdit.pageInfo:
Batch edit tags in scene presets.
Tag addition order is based on commas (,).
scenePresetEdit.emptyMessage: Drag or click a JSON file to edit.
